case_title: COLLECTIONS INCORPORATED OF SAN FRANCISCO vs. DUARTE, JOSEPH P AKA JOSEPH P DUARTE IND & DBA

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLLECTIONS INCORPORATED OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT DUARTE, JOSEPH P AKA JOSEPH P DUARTE IND & DBA DUARTE TRUCKING SERVICE SUMMONS ISSUED
